channel.title: About me by Pranshu Gaba
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

item.title: About this site
item.description:
This website is my personal corner of the internet. Here, I share things that I have made: poems, puzzles, and more. I write articles about interesting things, websites, places, videos, etc. that I come across. This site is also a way for me to experiment and play around with CSS and JavaScript.

How it’s made

This site is built using a static site generator called Hugo. I write my content in Markdown, and Hugo automatically generates the relevant HTML files. I designed and wrote the theme on my own. You can find the source code for the site on its Github repository.

This site is deployed using Github actions and is hosted on GitHub pages.

Font faces

This site uses a variant of Inter as the primary font and JetBrains Mono for monospaced text.

Feeds

You can read my posts using a feed reader! Paste the following address in your favourite feed reader.

https://pranshugaba.com/index.xml

You will be notified whenever I publish a new post. You can also subscribe to only select sections. For more details, visit the subscribe page.

Support

If you like my work, consider supporting me at ko‑fi.com/pranshugaba. Thanks! 😄
